description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a hood with drawstrings, full front zipper, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and Bleed Blue label on the left cuff, two insert pockets on the sides with asymmetric openings, embroidered brand swoosh on the left chest, the number 10 appliqued on the right chest and rubber print of the number 10 on the back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron inside out; Do not iron on decorations Perfect for your sporting needs, this hooded sweatshirt from nike is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. The thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth, the stylish print gives you a strong sporty edge. Layer over long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
